MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion to Strike Claim of Terry Collins. Appearances: Hadi Razzaq, Deputy Public Defender, CCSF, (415) 575-8818, appearing for Terry Collins. No argument is allowed; Defendant failed to give notice pursuant to Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
